{{Quote|Artus is uninhabited, devoid of resources and off the major hyperlanes. Our patron could certainly hide there.|Watcher Two|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
The '''Artus system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Artus Prime]].

{{System-stub}}

==History==
At some point during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] [[Darth Jadus]]'s dreadnaught was stationed in Artus system. His ship was in orbit of gas giant [[Artus Five]] when it was infiltrated by [[Cipher Nine]]. Darth Jadus then reveled his plans to take over control of the Empire.

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jan Ors]] went on a mission on [[Artus Prime]] to investigate [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Artus Prime Mining Facility|mining facility]] that was captured by [[Imperial Remnant]] forces. The mission ended in [[Battle of Artus Prime]].
